# Growth Playbook

This file is maintained by the growth meta-agent. After each campaign episode, new guidelines are appended here. The Growth Head reads this file as context when planning the next campaign.

**Do not edit the rules manually** unless you are overriding a bad meta-agent suggestion — in which case, add a comment explaining the override.
